context_for_next_testing_agent:
Subscription Refactoring Testing Complete - Iteration 128

## Summary
The VIP/Membership to Explorer/Elite refactoring has been verified. The two-plan system is working correctly:
- Explorer (free) - New free users
- Elite (paid) - New paid subscribers
- Legacy plans (startup, growth, vip) - Treated as Elite for backward compatibility

## Key Verifications
1. is_paid_subscriber() function works correctly - growth users are treated as paid
2. subscription_plan is the primary field, membership_type kept for backward compat
3. PRC balance is preserved for paid users (not reset to 0)
4. Admin stats show elite_users count
5. Frontend shows 'Elite' terminology in HowItWorks page
6. Razorpay payment sets subscription_plan (not membership_type)

## Test User
- Mobile: 9970100782
- PIN: 997010
- Plan: growth (legacy - treated as Elite)
- PRC Balance: 30559.68

## Test Files Created
- /app/backend/tests/test_subscription_refactoring.py (13 tests)
- /app/tests/e2e/subscription-refactoring.spec.ts (6 tests)

## Notes
- Admin user (admin@paras.com) does not exist - admin tests were skipped
- Profile page shows 'Growth Member' badge (intentional for backward compat)
- SupportTickets page uses 'Elite subscription' terminology correctly
